name: Entrance to another Dimension
description:
The walls of the chamber begin to shimmer brightly.  The
outline of the pentagram catches fire and burns brightly.  The runes
on the slab begin to glow fiercely.  A droning sound begins and
intensifies painfully.  Reality seems to slip away as the room begins
to spin around you.  Trying to get a grip on yourself in this
maddening scene, you notice an entryway opening up before you.
